Rehabilitation Program

Post-Surgical Complications

Correcting joint stiffness, relieving nerve impingements, and speeding tissue healing after orthopedic or neurosurgery.

Book AssessmentWhatsApp
Specialities

OVERVIEW

Post-Surgical Complication Rehabilitation: Complete Recovery

Surgery — even highly successful surgery — can sometimes lead to unexpected complications that impair function and quality of life long after the procedure. Neurological complications of surgery (peripheral nerve injuries, stroke from cardiac surgery), orthopedic complications (poor wound healing, reduced range of motion, complex regional pain syndrome), and general deconditioning from prolonged hospital stays all require expert, specialized rehabilitation.

At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Post-Surgical Complication Rehabilitation Program provides comprehensive, expert care for patients who have not recovered fully after surgery. Our team identifies the specific complication and designs a targeted, evidence-based rehabilitation program to address it.

Our unique advantage is the combination of modern rehabilitation expertise with the extraordinary healing power of Kerala Ayurveda. Specific Ayurvedic therapies — wound-healing formulations, anti-inflammatory treatments, and tissue-regenerating therapies — act at the biological level to resolve post-surgical complications that conventional rehabilitation alone cannot fully address.

POST-SURGICAL CONDITIONS

Post-Surgical Complications We Rehabilitate

Expert rehabilitation for the full range of functional complications following any type of surgery.

Post-Operative Neurological Deficits

Peripheral nerve injuries, post-cardiac surgery stroke, and brachial plexus injuries from surgical positioning. Expert neurological rehabilitation to maximize recovery of strength and function.

Orthopedic Post-Surgical Complications

Reduced range of motion after joint replacement, complex regional pain syndrome (CRPS), post-amputation phantom limb pain, and post-spinal surgery complications requiring structured physiotherapy rehabilitation.

Post-ICU Deconditioning & Critical Illness Myopathy

Prolonged ICU stays lead to severe muscle weakness, fatigue, cognitive changes, and psychological trauma (ICU-acquired weakness, PTSD). Our intensive rehabilitation rebuilds strength and function systematically.

REHABILITATION SERVICES

Comprehensive Post-Surgical Rehabilitation

Expert, evidence-based rehabilitation targeting every aspect of post-surgical recovery and complication management.

1

Targeted Post-Surgical Physiotherapy

Precisely designed physiotherapy programs addressing the specific functional deficits of each patient's post-surgical complications. Manual therapy, electrotherapy (TENS, ultrasound), progressive strengthening, joint mobilization, gait rehabilitation, and scar tissue management — all delivered by physiotherapists with specialist post-surgical rehabilitation expertise.

2

Ayurvedic Post-Surgical Healing

Kerala Ayurveda provides uniquely powerful healing for post-surgical complications: Ksheeradhara (medicated milk stream therapy) reduces post-surgical neuroinflammation; Jatyadi Ghrita and Panchavalkala preparations accelerate wound healing and prevent keloid formation; Kizhi and Abhyanga resolve post-surgical joint stiffness and reduce neuropathic pain; Rasayana formulations rebuild vitality depleted by surgery and hospitalization.

3

Robotic-Assisted Rehabilitation

For patients with significant post-surgical motor deficits, robotic assistance enables safe, high-repetition training that manual physiotherapy cannot achieve. The G-EO system allows early weight-bearing gait practice after lower limb surgery, and Armotion supports upper limb recovery after shoulder, elbow, or neurological surgery.

4

Post-Surgical Pain Management

Chronic post-surgical pain is a significant and under-recognized problem. Our pain management team (physiatrists, pain physicians, physiotherapists, and Ayurvedic physicians) provide comprehensive multimodal pain management including CRPS treatment, neuropathic pain management, nerve blocks, and Ayurvedic analgesic therapies for complete, lasting pain relief.

POST-SURGICAL TECHNOLOGY

Advanced Post-Surgical Rehabilitation Capabilities

Complete technology and clinical expertise for comprehensive post-surgical recovery and complication management.

Electrotherapy Suite (TENS, US, FES)

Therapeutic ultrasound for scar tissue management, TENS for post-surgical pain control, and FES for post-surgical muscle strengthening — supporting tissue healing and functional recovery.

Robotic Gait Rehabilitation

G-EO system enabling early weight-bearing and gait training after lower limb and spinal surgery, preventing post-surgical deconditioning and accelerating return to mobility.

Ayurvedic Wound & Tissue Healing

Jatyadi Ghrita, Panchavalkala preparations, and Ksheeradhara therapy to accelerate wound healing, manage post-surgical inflammation, and prevent scar formation.

Hydrotherapy

Aquatic rehabilitation for post-surgical patients who cannot bear full weight, enabling early active exercise with buoyancy support to maintain muscle function during recovery.

CRPS Management

Comprehensive Complex Regional Pain Syndrome management combining graded motor imagery, desensitization physiotherapy, pain medications, nerve blocks, and Ayurvedic pain therapies.

RECOVERY TIMELINE

Your Recovery Journey

Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

1. Assessment

Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel.

2. Diagnosis

Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors.

3. Personalized Plan

Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols.

4. Therapy

Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments.

5. Monitoring

Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data.

6. Recovery

Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan.

COMMON QUERIES

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to key details about the Post-Surgical Complications program.

Our recovery protocol for Post-Surgical Complications combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains.

Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways.

Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists.

All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state.

Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care.

A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon.

Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains.

You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly.

Start Your Recovery Journey Today

Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.

India's pioneer in Integrated Ortho-Neuro Rehabilitation, fusing cutting-edge robotic tech with traditional Kerala Ayurveda to restore movement and dignity.
